TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tony_Bennett, title = Tony_Bennett, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tony_Bennett} }

S.FORM: Tony Bennett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 6, Tony Bennett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Tony Bennett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 6, Tony Bennett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tonj βennett s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tonj βennett, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
